PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-08-2021 Continued To Apr-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rhayna Jones in Propria Persona.
Ryan Jones, Larhonda Reddic and Brenda also present.

The Court questions why Ms. Jones is trying to open probate when the estate has a value of $50,000.00. Ms. Jones stated that she is trying to get ownership of her Father's property, that there is a motorcycle, two cars, a pickup truck, bank accounts and the insurance on the motorcycle. Ms. Reddic, Mr. Jones and Brenda indicated that they are here to support Ms. Jones. The Court suggested Ms. Jones seek legal help to find another way/shorter way to receive the assets and that Ms. Jones google a small estate affidavit. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to April 5, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
